title: United States Application for Travel Document — Reentry Permit and Advance Parole (Form I-131)
description: Apply for a Reentry Permit (to preserve lawful permanent resident status while abroad for an extended period) or an Advance Parole Document (permission to return to the United States after temporary travel while an immigration benefit application, such as Form I-485, is pending, or under certain other bases) using Department of Homeland Security / USCIS Form I-131, Application for Travel Documents, Parole Documents, and Arrival/Departure Records. Form I-131 also covers a Refugee Travel Document, a TPS Travel Authorization Document, and humanitarian parole / parole-in-place / re-parole requests (Part 1, Item Numbers 2, 3, 4, and 6-11); those application types are out of scope for this document — see VERIFICATION.md. It does not submit the application; the live U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) source is always authoritative (see verification).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema transcribed field-by-field from the live Form I-131 PDF at uscis.gov (fetched directly with curl, HTTP 200, no access block) using pdfjs-dist getFieldObjects()/getTextContent() (reading-order-sorted by glyph position) against all 14 pages. Scoped to the Reentry Permit and Advance Parole application types per the source issue; the Refugee Travel Document, TPS Travel Authorization Document, and initial-parole/parole-in-place/re-parole application types (Part 1, Item Numbers 2, 3, 4, 6-11; Parts 6, 8, 9) are out of scope — see VERIFICATION.md Scope decisions. Status remains 'draft' pending independent field-by-field source review by a second reviewer.

fields.name: travelDocumentType
fields.label: Application type — travel document requested
fields.description: Form I-131 also supports a Refugee Travel Document, a TPS Travel Authorization Document, and initial-parole/parole-in-place/re-parole Arrival-Departure Records (Part 1, Item Numbers 2, 3, 4, and 6-11); those application types are out of scope for this document — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 1, Item Numbers 1 and 5

fields.name: advanceParoleBasis
fields.label: Basis for the Advance Parole Document request
fields.description: Select the single basis under which advance parole is sought.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 1, Item Number 5, options A-M

fields.name: advanceParoleBasisReference
fields.label: Receipt number / class of admission / explanation supporting the basis above
fields.description: For a petition-based basis, the receipt number of the underlying Form (I-485, I-589, I-821, I-821D, I-914/I-914A, I-918/I-918A, I-817, I-687); for 'current_parolee_under_ina_212d5', the class of admission; for 'other', a written explanation. Not applicable for 'deferred_enforced_departure', which has no associated reference number.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 1, Item Number 5.A-5.M (receipt number / class of admission / explanation blanks)

fields.name: holdsRefugeeStatusOrDerivedLPR
fields.label: Do you hold status as a refugee, were you paroled as a refugee, or are you a lawful permanent resident as a direct result of being a refugee?
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: familyName
fields.label: Your full name — family name (last name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: givenName
fields.label: Your full name — given name (first name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: middleName
fields.label: Your full name — middle name (if applicable)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: otherNamesUsed
fields.label: Other names used (if applicable)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The form provides three structured family/given/middle name rows; modeled here as a semicolon-separated list of full names pending the GSP-0009 repeating-groups gap, consistent with the existing otherNamesUsed field on us/uscis/change-of-address-ar11 and us/dos/passport-application-ds11.

fields.name: mailingAddressInCareOfName
fields.label: Current mailing address or safe address — in care of name (if any)
fields.description: If applicable.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 2, Item Number 3 (In Care Of Name)

fields.name: mailingAddressLine1
fields.label: Current mailing address or safe address — street number and name
fields.description: Street address.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 2, Item Number 3 (Street Number and Name)

fields.name: mailingAddressApt
fields.label: Current mailing address or safe address — apartment/floor/suite
fields.description: If applicable. The form pairs this with an Apt./Ste./Flr. checkbox and a number; recorded here as free text (e.g. "Apt. 4B").
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 2, Item Number 3 (Apt./Ste./Flr. Number)

fields.name: mailingAddressCity
fields.label: Current mailing address or safe address — city or town
fields.description: City component of the address.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 2, Item Number 3 (City or Town)

fields.name: mailingAddressState
fields.label: Current mailing address or safe address — state
fields.description: For a U.S. address; leave blank for a foreign address (use mailingAddressProvince instead).

fields.name: mailingAddressZipCode
fields.label: Current mailing address or safe address — ZIP code
fields.description: For a U.S. address.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 2, Item Number 3 (ZIP Code)

fields.name: mailingAddressProvince
fields.label: Current mailing address or safe address — province
fields.description: For a foreign address.

fields.name: mailingAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Current mailing address or safe address — postal code
fields.description: For a foreign address.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 2, Item Number 3 (Postal Code)

fields.name: mailingAddressCountry
fields.label: Current mailing address or safe address — country
fields.description: Country component of the address.

fields.name: physicalAddressDiffersFromMailing
fields.label: Is your current physical address different from your mailing address?
fields.description: If true, give the physicalAddress* fields. Not itself a numbered form item; inferred from the form's "if different from the above address" instruction, the same synthetic-boolean treatment used for us/uscis/permanent-resident-card-replacement-i90.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 2, Item Number 4 preamble

fields.name: physicalAddressInCareOfName
fields.label: Current physical address (if different from mailing) — in care of name (if any)
fields.description: If applicable.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 2, Item Number 4 (In Care Of Name)

fields.name: physicalAddressLine1
fields.label: Current physical address (if different from mailing) — street number and name
fields.description: Street address.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 2, Item Number 4 (Street Number and Name)

fields.name: physicalAddressApt
fields.label: Current physical address (if different from mailing) — apartment/floor/suite
fields.description: If applicable. The form pairs this with an Apt./Ste./Flr. checkbox and a number; recorded here as free text (e.g. "Apt. 4B").
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 2, Item Number 4 (Apt./Ste./Flr. Number)

fields.name: physicalAddressCity
fields.label: Current physical address (if different from mailing) — city or town
fields.description: City component of the address.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 2, Item Number 4 (City or Town)

fields.name: physicalAddressState
fields.label: Current physical address (if different from mailing) — state
fields.description: For a U.S. address; leave blank for a foreign address (use physicalAddressProvince instead).

fields.name: physicalAddressZipCode
fields.label: Current physical address (if different from mailing) — ZIP code
fields.description: For a U.S. address.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 2, Item Number 4 (ZIP Code)

fields.name: physicalAddressProvince
fields.label: Current physical address (if different from mailing) — province
fields.description: For a foreign address.

fields.name: physicalAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Current physical address (if different from mailing) — postal code
fields.description: For a foreign address.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 2, Item Number 4 (Postal Code)

fields.name: physicalAddressCountry
fields.label: Current physical address (if different from mailing) — country
fields.description: Country component of the address.

fields.name: alienRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Alien Registration Number (A-Number) (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Digits only (the form prefixes a printed "A-"); leave blank if none has been assigned.

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: Country of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: countryOfCitizenshipOrNationality
fields.label: Country of citizenship or nationality
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: socialSecurityNumber
fields.label: U.S. Social Security Number (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: uscisOnlineAccountNumber
fields.label: USCIS Online Account Number (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: classOfAdmission
fields.label: Class of Admission (COA) (if any)
fields.description: The immigration classification under which the applicant was admitted or granted status (e.g. "IR1", "CR1", "F2A"), if any.

fields.name: mostRecentI94RecordNumber
fields.label: Most Recent Form I-94 Arrival/Departure Record Number (if any)
fields.description: Conditionally required by the form when the applicant is physically present in the United States and seeking a TPS travel authorization document, advance parole, re-parole, or parole in place (Part 1, Item Numbers 4, 5, 8, 9, 10, or 11); not modeled as a hard requiredWhen because "physically present in the United States" is not itself a captured field in this document's scope.

fields.name: ethnicity
fields.label: Ethnicity (select only one box)
fields.description: Select only one box.

fields.name: race
fields.label: Race (select all applicable boxes)
fields.description: Select all applicable boxes. Modeled as a comma-separated list of: american_indian_or_alaska_native, asian, black_or_african_american, native_hawaiian_or_other_pacific_islander, white — the same enum vocabulary and multi-select-as-string treatment as us/uscis/permanent-resident-card-replacement-i90, pending the GSP-0009 repeating/multi-select gap.

fields.name: heightFeet
fields.label: Height — feet
fields.description: The form presents this as a dropdown of whole feet.

fields.name: heightInches
fields.label: Height — inches
fields.description: The form presents this as a dropdown of whole inches.

fields.name: weightPounds
fields.label: Weight — pounds
fields.description: The form provides three single-digit boxes for pounds.

fields.name: eyeColor
fields.label: Eye color (select only one box)
fields.description: Select only one box.

fields.name: hairColor
fields.label: Hair color (select only one box)
fields.description: Select only one box.

fields.name: everInRemovalProceedings
fields.label: Has the person who will receive the travel document, if approved, been in any exclusion, deportation, removal, or rescission proceedings?
fields.description: If true, provide a detailed explanation using the form's Part 13 Additional Information continuation space (out of scope for this document).

fields.name: everIssuedReentryPermitOrRefugeeTravelDocument
fields.label: Have you EVER before been issued a Reentry Permit or Refugee Travel Document?
fields.description: If true, give priorReentryOrRefugeeDocumentDateIssued and priorReentryOrRefugeeDocumentDisposition for the last document issued.

fields.name: priorReentryOrRefugeeDocumentDateIssued
fields.label: Date Issued (of the last Reentry Permit or Refugee Travel Document)
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: priorReentryOrRefugeeDocumentDisposition
fields.label: Disposition of the last Reentry Permit or Refugee Travel Document (attached, lost, stolen, damaged/destroyed, still in my possession, etc.)

fields.name: everIssuedAdvanceParoleDocument
fields.label: Have you EVER been issued an Advance Parole Document?
fields.description: If true, give priorAdvanceParoleDateIssued and priorAdvanceParoleDisposition for the last document issued.

fields.name: priorAdvanceParoleDateIssued
fields.label: Date Issued (of the last Advance Parole Document)
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: priorAdvanceParoleDisposition
fields.label: Disposition of the last Advance Parole Document (attached, lost, stolen, damaged/destroyed, still in my possession, etc.)

fields.name: requestingReplacementDocument
fields.label: Are you requesting a replacement Reentry Permit or Advance Parole Document?
fields.description: The form's Item Number 4 also covers replacement of a Refugee Travel Document or TPS Travel Authorization Document, out of scope for this document.

fields.name: replacementReason
fields.label: Reason for requesting a replacement document
fields.description: Select one.

fields.name: correctionItemsNeeded
fields.label: Information that needs to be corrected (select all applicable boxes)
fields.description: Modeled as a comma-separated list of: name, a_number, country_of_birth_or_citizenship, terms_and_conditions, date_of_birth, sex, validity_date, photo — the same multi-select-as-string treatment as the race field, pending GSP-0009.

fields.name: correctionExplanation
fields.label: Explanation of what is incorrect on the current document
fields.description: Attach copies of any documents supporting the correction request (out of scope for this data-only document).
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 4, Item Number 6.a (explanation box)

fields.name: replacedDocumentReceiptNumber
fields.label: Receipt number of the Form I-131 related to the document you are seeking to replace

fields.name: reentryPermitDeliveryMethod
fields.label: Where do you want your Reentry Permit sent?
fields.description: The form's Item Numbers 7-9 apply to Reentry Permit and Refugee Travel Document delivery only; an Advance Parole Document applicant skips directly to Part 7 (see Form Item Number 6.b instruction).

fields.name: reentryPermitOverseasCity
fields.label: City or Town of the U.S. Embassy, U.S. Consulate, or USCIS international field office

fields.name: reentryPermitOverseasCountry
fields.label: Country of the U.S. Embassy, U.S. Consulate, or USCIS international field office

fields.name: reentryPermitNotificationDeliveryMethod
fields.label: Where should the notification to pick up the Reentry Permit be sent?
fields.description: Only asked when the document itself is being sent to an overseas embassy/consulate/field office.

fields.name: notificationAddressInCareOfName
fields.label: Notification address — in care of name (if any)
fields.description: If applicable.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 4, Item Number 9.a (In Care Of Name)

fields.name: notificationAddressLine1
fields.label: Notification address — street number and name
fields.description: Street address.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 4, Item Number 9.a (Street Number and Name)

fields.name: notificationAddressApt
fields.label: Notification address — apartment/floor/suite
fields.description: If applicable. The form pairs this with an Apt./Ste./Flr. checkbox and a number; recorded here as free text (e.g. "Apt. 4B").
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 4, Item Number 9.a (Apt./Ste./Flr. Number)

fields.name: notificationAddressCity
fields.label: Notification address — city or town
fields.description: City component of the address.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 4, Item Number 9.a (City or Town)

fields.name: notificationAddressState
fields.label: Notification address — state
fields.description: For a U.S. address; leave blank for a foreign address (use notificationAddressProvince instead).

fields.name: notificationAddressZipCode
fields.label: Notification address — ZIP code
fields.description: For a U.S. address.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 4, Item Number 9.a (ZIP Code)

fields.name: notificationAddressProvince
fields.label: Notification address — province
fields.description: For a foreign address.

fields.name: notificationAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Notification address — postal code
fields.description: For a foreign address.
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 4, Item Number 9.a (Postal Code)

fields.name: notificationAddressCountry
fields.label: Notification address — country
fields.description: Country component of the address.

fields.name: notificationDaytimePhoneNumber
fields.label: Notification address — daytime phone number
fields.description: In international E.164 format.

fields.name: notificationEmail
fields.label: Notification address — email address (if any)

fields.name: timeSpentOutsideUS
fields.label: Since becoming a permanent resident of the United States (or during the past 5 years, whichever is less), how much total time have you spent outside the United States?

fields.name: dateOfIntendedDeparture
fields.label: Date of Intended Departure
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: purposeOfTrip
fields.label: Purpose of trip
fields.description: If extra space is needed, the form directs the applicant to Part 13 Additional Information (out of scope for this document).

fields.name: countriesToVisit
fields.label: List the countries you intend to visit

fields.name: numberOfTrips
fields.label: How many trips do you intend to use this document?

fields.name: expectedLengthOfTripDays
fields.label: Expected Length of Trip (in days)

fields.name: applicantDaytimePhoneNumber
fields.label: Applicant's Daytime Telephone Number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: applicantMobilePhoneNumber
fields.label: Applicant's Mobile Telephone Number (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: applicantEmail
fields.label: Applicant's Email Address (if any)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: applicantSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of Signature
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD. By signing, the applicant certifies under penalty of perjury that all responses and information provided are complete, true, and correct.

fields.name: usedInterpreter
fields.label: Was an interpreter used to complete this application?
fields.description: Not itself a numbered form item; inferred from the Part 11 heading "If no interpreter was used, skip to Part 12," the same synthetic-boolean treatment used for us/uscis/permanent-resident-card-replacement-i90's usedInterpreter field. If true, complete the interpreter* fields.

fields.name: interpreterFamilyName
fields.label: Interpreter's Family Name (Last Name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: interpreterGivenName
fields.label: Interpreter's Given Name (First Name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: interpreterBusinessOrOrganizationName
fields.label: Interpreter's Business or Organization Name (if any)

fields.name: interpreterLanguage
fields.label: Language in which the interpreter is fluent (in addition to English) and communicated with the applicant
fields.sourceRef: Form I-131 Part 11, Interpreter's Certification (language blank)

fields.name: interpreterDaytimePhoneNumber
fields.label: Interpreter's Daytime Telephone Number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: interpreterMobilePhoneNumber
fields.label: Interpreter's Mobile Telephone Number (if any)
fields.description: In international E.164 format.

fields.name: interpreterEmail
fields.label: Interpreter's Email Address (if any)

fields.name: interpreterSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of Interpreter's Signature
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: usedPreparer
fields.label: Was this application prepared by someone other than the applicant?
fields.description: Not itself a numbered form item; inferred from the Part 12 heading, the same synthetic-boolean treatment used for us/uscis/permanent-resident-card-replacement-i90's usedPreparer field. If true, complete the preparer* fields.

fields.name: preparerFamilyName
fields.label: Preparer's Family Name (Last Name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: preparerGivenName
fields.label: Preparer's Given Name (First Name)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: preparerBusinessOrOrganizationName
fields.label: Preparer's Business or Organization Name (if any)

fields.name: preparerDaytimePhoneNumber
fields.label: Preparer's Daytime Telephone Number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: preparerMobilePhoneNumber
fields.label: Preparer's Mobile Telephone Number (if any)
fields.description: In international E.164 format.

fields.name: preparerEmail
fields.label: Preparer's Email Address (if any)

fields.name: preparerSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of Preparer's Signature
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD.

steps.title: Biographic information of the person who will receive the travel document
Complete only if applying for a Reentry Permit
Information about your proposed travel — complete only if applying for an Advance Parole Document
Applicant's contact information, certification, and signature
Interpreter's contact information, certification, and signature
Preparer's contact information, declaration, and signature
